programme.title: SHERO - EP 6
programme.desc: Ruixiang is hospitalized. Junsheng suspects the assassination is related to RSB's illegal doings. Yinchen officially completes and passes the bodyguard training. Ruixiang requests for Yinchen to be his bodyguard Yinchen takes up this job with Jingyu. Yinchen confesses her feelings to Junsheng, only to realize that he sees her as a friend. The person that he likes is actually Yinxi...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 9
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 315
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 292
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 269
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 236
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 284
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 295
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung’s health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 222
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion.

programme.title: No.17 Music Live House S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Five popular musicians, Liang Long, Hu Xia, Bai Jugang, Curly G, and Huang Zihongfan, reversed their image as singers and served as Live House staff, starting this music journey again with a new attitude. At the same time, with the new slogan "There is always happiness to speak out", the program will witness more beauty and surprises in the music they deliver to the audience.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 35
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 3
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De's aunt, Shi Li, and his good friend, Xiao Ping, are very worried by his sudden disappearance so they decided to make a police report. After hearing Bi An's name, Bi De realised that Bi An is his great grandfather, which explains why they look so much alike. Bi An does not believe him.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 75
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhengmin finds Zhi-en's wedding ring on the kitchen floor and realises she may be in danger. At the police station, his concerns are dismissed as the officer insists that she merely stepped out after an argument with her husband.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 76
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Enzhu finds a text on Zhengmin's phone revealing Zhi-en's pregnancy. She deletes it and has Bingtie install a bugging program on his phone to monitor his every move.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Yanshan Trail in Sanxia, New Taipei, is a classic route rich in cultural and historical value - a perfect living fossil journey for travelers. Sanxia’s history dates back to the late Ming and early Qing dynasties, when Han settlers began cultivating the land and forming a bustling market town. Time has passed, yet many century-old buildings remain, preserving its charm.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 22
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan decides to use Nan Taizhu to get to Yunzhen. She takes Yaling and everyone looks for them.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 70
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Yanshan Trail in Sanxia, New Taipei, is a classic route rich in cultural and historical value - a perfect living fossil journey for travelers. Sanxia’s history dates back to the late Ming and early Qing dynasties, when Han settlers began cultivating the land and forming a bustling market town. Time has passed, yet many century-old buildings remain, preserving its charm.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 5
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 33
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 34
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 282
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: James’ Going Places - EP 89
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 6
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 10
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 466
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Fish Flew Away
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] When Mr. Zhong dies, he leaves behind two women, ex-wife Li Yu and current wife Shen Qing, and one small problem, a courtyard both can claim. Forced together, their clash becomes an unexpected journey of understanding.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 31
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 25
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 10
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 6
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 1
programme.desc: The story follows two people who found Muay Thai in their ordinary lives and begin to understand the value of life. After going through countless blows, injuries, self-doubts and other ups and downs, they finally achieved their own dreams!

programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 12
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Job Paling The B35T Adalah Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Determined to support her family's struggling finances, Dinda tackles any odd job she can find until she finally lands her dream career as a wedding planner. However, her excitement is cut short when she is forced to partner up with Zidan-a stubborn guy with whom she had just shared a fierce, chaotic argument. Now, the bitter rivals must learn to coordinate fairytale weddings together without destroying each other.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4 - EP 22
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong
programme.desc: Kiara (Ciara Brosnan) runs away from home, angry and ashamed of her aunt, Ghita (Shanice Margaretha), who sells getuk. While Ghita searches for Kiara, Githa is assisted by Yudi (Rizky Fachrel), a handsome teacher at Kiara's school.

programme.title: HOT SHOT - EP 582
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 13
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Aku vs Ayah Lawak
programme.desc: Does witnessing a murder mean your own life is forfeit? Anya (Ina Marika) is plunged into absolute panic when her father, Budi (Derry Drajat), suddenly vanishes without a trace after a tragic event. In the midst of her terror and desperation, the calm and protective Dion (Sandy Pradana) steps into her life, serving as her ultimate anchor and protector.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 11
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 11
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Romeo dan Juliet Dari Baturraden
programme.desc: Yuli, the daughter of a resort entrepreneur in Baturraden, was arranged by her father for business purposes. Unwilling to be married, Yuli ran away with her boyfriend, Romi, a housekeeper at her father's resort.

programme.title: Ampun King! Kopi Pahit Tapi Mbanya Manis
programme.desc: Wulan was matched with Bagas. Bagas, meeting Wulan for the first time, immediately picked her up at the bus station. Because Bagas didn't know who Wulan was, he ended up searching for her. When they arrived at the bus station, Wulan, alone, was chased by thugs. Not knowing where to go, Wulan ended up getting into Bagas's car.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 21
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 23
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Malam Minggu Bersama Nenek
programme.desc: Raka (Fandy Christian) crosses paths with Alya (Amanda Salma) during a casual Saturday night outing with his grandmother. What begins as a simple, fleeting encounter quickly blossoms into deep romantic feelings-though their budding love is soon put to the test by the stark contrast between their two different worlds

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: The story tells of Acha and Daffa's pre-wedding event suddenly failed because Daffa already had another girlfriend. Then, at the suggestion of her sister, Acha finally went ahead with the pre-wedding event with another man named Mamat. Mamat was given a makeover, like a foreigner who had just arrived in Indonesia. Although it was all a ruse, it managed to annoy Daffa. So, will Mamat's disguise be exposed?

programme.title: Tagihan Cintanya Sudah Over Limit
programme.desc: Viona is being forced by her father to get married soon, for the sake of her family's business. Meanwhile, Viona is heartbroken. Suddenly, Viona remembers Bagas, the man who once hit her car. Bagas is a kind person and one of the administrators at the Cahaya Shelter.

programme.title: Tukar Nasib Kok Jadi Makin Asik
programme.desc: Nila and Fira are sisters. Nila and Fira's personalities are very different. Nila is a beautiful and fashionable girl, Nila is also liked by many men at her school. In contrast to Fira who appears simple and ordinary. However, Fira is a chef at a restaurant. One time, Fira and Nila were involved in an argument in the car and finally the car they were riding in was hit by a tree, Nila and Fira were admitted to the hospital and it seemed that Nila and Fira's bodies had been swapped.

programme.title: Mundur Wir, Aku Jadian Sama Bodyguardku
programme.desc: After Rindu (Rayna Snova) courageously foils a robbery and saves Arga, a grateful Arga wants to hire her as his personal bodyguard. However, Arga's girlfriend has already hired a tough professional named Rendy (Jeff Smith) for the job. To settle who is worthy, the young girl and Rendy face off in an intense duel. Impressed by their fierce combat skills, Arga makes a bold decision: he hires both of them to protect him

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 216
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jagain Jodoh Orang Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Feni (Larasati Nugroho) is deeply in love with Madun (Hardi Fadhillah), but their romance hits a wall due to her mother's disapproval. Working as a humble motorcycle taxi (ojek) driver with a meager income, Madun is banned from seeing Feni until he strikes it rich. Under family pressure, Feni tries to break things off to find a wealthy suitor in the city, but a stubborn Madun refuses to let her go without a fight.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 18
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 164
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Jagain Jodoh Orang Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Feni (Larasati Nugroho) is deeply in love with Madun (Hardi Fadhillah), but their romance hits a wall due to her mother's disapproval. Working as a humble motorcycle taxi (ojek) driver with a meager income, Madun is banned from seeing Feni until he strikes it rich. Under family pressure, Feni tries to break things off to find a wealthy suitor in the city, but a stubborn Madun refuses to let her go without a fight.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 18
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 164
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Biarin Gombal Yang Penting Manisnya Pas
programme.desc: Nita (Amanda Salmakhira) faces relentless bullying from her college peers, especially Sarah, because of her weight. However, Arya (Ridho Illahi), a handsome assistant lecturer, constantly steps in to protect and defend her. Deep down, Nita reminds Arya of his long-lost childhood friend, Tata, driving him on a mission to uncover if Nita is the girl he has been searching for all these years

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 216
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Bertebaran Boss Panutan
programme.desc: Bimantara (Naufal Samudra) initially approaches Livia (Shanice Margaretha) purely to climb the corporate ladder and snatch a high-profile position in her company. However, his presence becomes a breath of fresh air for Livia, who is reeling from a painful breakup after discovering her ex, Devan (Rizky Fachrel), cheated with her business rival, Marsya (Gabriella Larasati). Eager to protect her, Bimantara teams up with Livia to expose her ex's corporate and romantic betrayal.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 18
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTAKU NYASAR KE PANTI ASUHAN
programme.desc: Niken (Gesya Shandy) courageously steps in to save Dion (Rizky Alatas) from an angry mob, only to discover that Dion is a ruthless developer planning to demolish the orphanage she protects. Later, when Dion gets into a severe accident, Niken saves his life once again. To repay his immense debt of gratitude, Dion is forced to live and work at the orphanage for a whole month.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 165
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: KUE BOLU BIKIN RINDUNYA VALID NO DEBAT
programme.desc: Ryan is furious when the feisty Dinar mistakes him for a humble motorcycle taxi driver. However, their chaotic and explosive first encounter sets off an unexpected chain of events that accidentally drags them straight to the altar.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 217
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Tutor Dapat Restu Mami Pliss
programme.desc: While most kids are proud of having a beautiful mother, Maura (Flavio Zaviera) finds it exhausting because her gorgeous mom, Mili, always steals the spotlight. To make matters worse, Maura is socially awkward around guys-getting tongue-tied around ordinary boys and completely freezing near handsome ones. Consequently, whenever the charming Arsena (Fattah Syah) visits, Maura puts up a cold, grumpy front out of pure panic, often running away mid-conversation

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 19

programme.title: Mundur Wir, Aku Jadian Sama Bodyguardku
programme.desc: After Rindu (Rayna Snova) courageously foils a robbery and saves Arga, a grateful Arga wants to hire her as his personal bodyguard. However, Arga's girlfriend has already hired a tough professional named Rendy (Jeff Smith) for the job. To settle who is worthy, the young girl and Rendy face off in an intense duel. Impressed by their fierce combat skills, Arga makes a bold decision: he hires both of them to protect him

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 217

programme.title: ABANG KEMBANG DIUBER MANTAN
programme.desc: A bizarre flower garland carried by Arhan turns out to be an unexpected blessing in disguise. Despite its strange contents and the endless, chaotic twists of fate it causes, the quirky arrangement ultimately leads Arhan straight to his true soulmate

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 218
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biarin Aja Aku Cinta Kamu Selama Gak Makan Ternak Warga
programme.desc: Determined to escape an arranged marriage orchestrated by her father, Winda (Shanice Margaretha) flees her home. During her frantic escape, her car accidentally hits Timmy, a prized goat belonging to Ikbal (Kevin Hillers). Horrified by the accident, Winda takes full responsibility and joins Ikbal’s group, promising to care for the injured goat while hiding from her past

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 20

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 13
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 9
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik minggu ini untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Layan Je Super Spontan - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Gelak Gempak Edisi Khas - EP 2
programme.desc: Bersama Dato’ Afdlin, Sherry & Joanne Kam sebagai juri dan barisan artis popular seperti Bell Ngasri, Tiz Zaqyah, Yasmin Aziz dan ramai lagi membuat standup comedy dalam Gelak Gempak Edisi Khas!

programme.title: Pesta Muda Mudi - EP 2
programme.desc: Memberi penghargaan kepada lagu-lagu pop Malaysia sepanjang zaman dari tahun 1930 hingga ke tahun 2010 untuk dipersembahkan oleh artis tempatan dalam bentuk akustik.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 1
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 5
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 11
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 8
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 5
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Rancangan yang memaparkan Zero sebagai sebuah kumpulan lawak di atas satu pentas.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 9
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: The Chosen One 2024 - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan bakat-bakat muda yang akan mempersembahkan nyanyian terbaik mereka di bawah bimbingan barisan penyanyi terkemuka tanahair sebagai coach!

programme.title: Sepahtu - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan gelak ketawa untuk anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 1

programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 2
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 6
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Klik Riders - EP 22

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong ? - EP 4
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 3

programme.title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
programme.desc: Honest inspector Ravi Kapoor gets into trouble with criminals Sonu and Chandidas. After getting them imprisoned, their children are kidnapped, and Sonu's thirst for revenge clashes. Release Year: 1989 Director: Mehul Kumar

programme.title: Agent Vinod
programme.desc: RAW agent Vinod travels across nations to learn who killed Rajan and why a nuclear suitcase sparked chaos, exposing a global conspiracy that ends in London. Release Year: 2012 Director: Sriram Raghavan

programme.title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
programme.desc: Aarti leaves her wedding when told she must quit working. Choosing independence and self respect, she walks away to protect her dreams and career. Release Year: 2017 Director: Ratnaa Sinha

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: Thrown out by her own family, a young woman finds support from a loyal ally, forming a bond that survives repeated hardships and unexpected twists of fate.

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Patriarch Ishwar Chandra Thakur's peaceful life shatters when his lazy son Adiya marries an enemy's daughter, forcing Ishwar to teach him hard lessons about struggle and survival. Release Year: 2005 Director: Yash Chopra

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay and Aditi, two individuals belonging to different castes, fall in love and wish to get married. However, knowing their parents will disapprove, they hatch a plan to convince them. Release Year: 2021 Director: Devanshu Singh

programme.title: Pukar
programme.desc: Anjali Madhuri loves Major Jaidev Anil Kapoor. But Jaidev loves Pooja. An embittered Anjali swears vengeance. Jaidevs enemies use Anjali to settle scores with him.2000 Release Year: 2000 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 2001 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest ActorAnil Kapoor

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Courier Boy Kalyan
programme.desc: In love with Kavya, Kalyan becomes a courier boy and visits her office every day.Things change when he is handed a parcel that could doctors in trouble.

programme.title: Raazi
programme.desc: RAW agent Sehmat marries into a Pakistani family to spy for India, risking her life, emotions, and marriage while secretly protecting her nation. programme.desc: Veteran crime journalist Joy feels outdated in a hyper-digital world. Chasing a fresh story, he uncovers buried truths that challenge power, media ethics, and his conscience deeply forever. Release Year: 2024 Director: Kanu Behl.

programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Shakuntala Devi, a mathematician's journey to become 'The Human Computer' and her relationship with her daughter.

programme.desc: A plot of land is donated to an old man by a kind-hearted landlord who then passes away. The landlord's lecherous and alcoholic son falls into bad company and wants to acquire this land at any cost.

programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.desc: Karan and Varun go to Mauritius to study but decide to stay back as they enjoy their new lifestyle. However, things take an unusual turn when their parents come to stay with them.

programme.desc: A woman seeks to escape her engagement to a violent politician, but when a stranger comes to her aid, the two face an onslaught of bigotry and hate.

programme.desc: An upright Forest Officer who strives for balance in a world of man-animal conflict while she also seeks her true calling in a hostile environment.

programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1832
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 1
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Ardennes, Toute ame A Ses Petits Secrets
programme.desc: Enigmatic psychiatrist Olivier Rimbaud lives in an isolated manor in Champagne-Ardenne. In addition to taking care of his patients, he does profiling to help the police with the most complex cases. As he sets out on the trail of a serial killer, his own secrets catch up with him.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 11
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: L'ocean Vu Du Coeur
programme.desc: Surrounded by experts, scientists, explorers, or simple fishermen, the astrophysicist and ecologist Hubert Reeves, who passed away in 2023, proposes to identify what threatens the ocean today and exposes the latest discoveries on the intelligence of animals and ocean ecosystems.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 1
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande, Quebeckers of Haitian origin and parents of three children, see themselves offered new career prospect. But will they be brave enough to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 2
programme.desc: Myrlande, who has to defend a member of the local mafia, decides to delay announcing her career change when Father Moses invites her to be the honorary sponsor of the local community fair.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 3
programme.desc: Myrlande tries to persuade her parents and parents-in-law to accept her career change, but for them anything new is always a bit of a shock.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 4
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande have fallen out with the former even going as far as to avoid his wife. He holds it against her that she hid the identity of her new boss from him.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 32
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Movie - Kanthaswamy
programme.desc: The financial woes of anyone who leaves a message at a temple are taken care of by a masked crusader. Meanwhile, a CBI officer is in hot pursuit of those who stash away their black money.

programme.title: Movie - Vaanam
programme.desc: When the lives of five individuals living in different places cross one another, it results in the transformation of their persona and purpose.

programme.title: Movie - Neer Nilam Neruppu
programme.desc: Chellama makes her sister marry her husband Kuppan after she is unable to conceive. Soon, they are blessed with a child. Kuppan is then smitten with Rajathi, jeopardising the lives of his two wives.

programme.title: Movie - Nenjathai Killadhae
programme.desc: Aanandi meets Vasan who likes experimenting with life's various situations. They challenge each other for another experiment during which she actually falls in love with him. But Vasan rejects her.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Joot Are You Ready
programme.desc: Easwaran, a man from a small village, moves to his brother's house in Chennai with his ailing father. However, his life turns upside down when his brother incurs the wrath of a local thug.

programme.title: Movie - Ullasa Paravaigal
programme.desc: Unable to come to terms with the death of his girlfriend, Ravi becomes lonely and despondent. Ravi's father and friend encourage him to take some time away, and when he reunites with an old childhood friend, his spirits are lifted once more.

programme.title: Movie - Kandukondain Kandukondain
programme.desc: Sowmya loves Manohar, an aspiring film director, and her sister is smitten with Srikanth. However, things take a turn when both the sisters are betrayed by their respective lovers.

programme.title: Movie - Senkoattai
programme.desc: After foiling an assassination attempt on the PM, CBI officer Shekhar follows the lead on a foreigner, Franka. This in turn leads him to a minister Thirumurthy, who is the real mastermind.

programme.title: Movie - Thavasi
programme.desc: Thavasi and Sankarapandi are sworn enemies. A young man, Thangarasu, commits suicide when wrongly accused by Thavasi for stealing. Why does Thavasi send his son to live in Thangarasu's house?

programme.title: Movie - Thambikku Intha Ooru
programme.desc: Akil, a rich youth, runs a restaurant in partnership with his friend Cola Kumar in Singapore. One day, he discovers that he is an orphan and thus embarks on a journey to find his biological parents.

programme.title: Movie - Neruppukul Eeram
programme.desc: Police officer Karthik is hell-bent on putting Baba, a local goon, behind bars. However, Karthik's fiancee Radha requests him to forgive Baba by giving him a chance to reform.

programme.title: Movie - Nilaa Kaalam
programme.desc: Nila's mother, an actress, is separated from her husband. Nila has all the comforts but no friends. She befriends two boys who work in a garage. They plan a picnic that may change everything, forever.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kaalamellam Kaathiruppen
programme.desc: Rich boy Kannan hears Manimekalai sing in a temple and falls in love with her. But when all his attempts to befriend her only earn her wrath, he has to find a new way to impress her.

programme.title: Movie - Mirugam
programme.desc: Ayyanar is a womanising, savage man who beats up innocents and rapes women. He marries the pretty Alagamma who first hates him but later decides to transform him. However, his sinful past soon catches up.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Thambi Periya Thambi
programme.desc: Two illiterate brothers try hard to win the love of a girl whose parents died in an accident. They have to protect her from a wealthy man and his son who have their lecherous eyes on her.

programme.title: Movie - Sippikkul Muthu
programme.desc: Sivayya, a person with autism, lives in a village with his grandmother. Things take a turn when he marries a widow, Lalitha, in order to save her from the atrocities of widowhood.

programme.title: Movie - Velaiyilla Pattathari 2
programme.desc: When Raghuvaran, a civil engineer, declines a job offer from businesswoman Vasundhara, she makes it her mission to trouble him.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026 the Memorial Tournament p/b Workday Round 4 (Live)
programme.desc: The Memorial Tournament is a PGA Tour golf tournament founded in 1976 by Jack Nicklaus. It is played on a Nicklaus-designed course at Muirfield Village Golf Club in Dublin, Ohio, a suburb north of Columbus. One of the features of the tournament is a yearly induction ceremony honoring past golfers. A plaque for each honoree is installed near the clubhouse at Muirfield. It is one of only five tournaments given "invitational" status by the PGA Tour.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 H/Ls Qatar TotalEnergies Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Khalifa International Tennis and Squash Complex in Doha, Qatar.

programme.title: Heroines 2026 Season 4
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Europe Tour - CIC Tour de la Provence H/Ls
programme.desc: The Tour de la Provence is an annual early-season professional road cycling stage race held in the Provence region of southern France. The race is historically connected to the local French newspaper La Provence.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) SF 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Rome, Italy, at the historic Foro Italico. The tournament was first held in 1930 and moved to its current home in Rome in 1935.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) SF 2
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Rome, Italy, at the historic Foro Italico. The tournament was first held in 1930 and moved to its current home in Rome in 1935.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Rome, Italy, at the historic Foro Italico. The tournament was first held in 1930 and moved to its current home in Rome in 1935.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 18 AUG
programme.desc: Review bursts into life with Matchweek 1 of the 2025/26 Premier League with a blockbuster Sunday showdown as Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford. Chelsea face an immediate test against Crystal Palace, Wolves welcome Manchester City to Molinuex, and Liverpool kick-off their title defence against Bournemouth.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik
programme.desc: This episode features a Fight of the Night contest between strawweights Cheyanne 'The Warrior Princess' Vlismas and Karolina 'The Polish Assassin' Wojcik, both making their debut. This was a 3-round war with one fighter taking home the split decision victory. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Juan Diaz vs Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features 'Baby Bull', Juan Diaz, (34-2, 17 KOs) battling Paul Malignaggi, aka 'Magic Man', (26-2, 5 KOs) in a junior welterweight title bout from the Toyota Center in Houston, Texas, USA, on August 22, 2009. Over 7,000 filled the arena for this bout, while another 1.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Erik Morales vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight title bout that goes the full 12 rounds, between the unbeaten Danny Garcia and veteran Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Terunofuji, Tobizaru, Ryuden and Tamawashi.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania where the top 30 competitors from the Pittsburgh Qualifier tackle the Pittsburgh Finals course.

programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania where the top 30 competitors from the Pittsburgh Qualifier tackle the Pittsburgh Finals course.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik
programme.desc: This episode features a Fight of the Night contest between strawweights Cheyanne 'The Warrior Princess' Vlismas and Karolina 'The Polish Assassin' Wojcik, both making their debut. This was a 3-round war with one fighter taking home the split decision victory. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008. A total of 14,152 were in attendance at Madison Square Garden to see Calzaghe in his last professional bout, but would he go out a winner?

programme.title: Greatest Classics Roberto Duran vs. Sean Fitzgerald
programme.desc: One of the greatest fighters of all time, Boxing Hall of Famer Roberto Duran, continues his comeback against Worcester, Massachusetts native Sean Fitzgerald. Duran would enter the bout coming off three straight victories, looking to continue his run towards another shot at a world championship. He would get more than he bargained for against the young undefeated Fitzgerald, who gave Duran a more competitive fight than anyone could have expected.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a WBO welterweight title bout featuring then-undefeated Paul Williams and Antonio Margarito. It's a closely scored bout, but one fighter's push towards a strong finish may have put him ahead just enough.

This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels have different ideas about what makes a good party. But the Squirrels have lots of ideas about what happens when the clock strikes twelve. Are they right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 106
programme.desc: Laa-Laa has fun counting to three; 1, 2, 3 rabbits, 1, 2, 3 flowers and 1, 2, 3 trees! Laa­Laa even counts three Teletubbies; Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 12
programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 13
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 14
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 38
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Wimbledon in England.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 40
programme.desc: While in Mexico Glitch takes a short cut through the Cave of Crystals, a very hot hidden space that contains some of the biggest crystals in the world! The clumsy Grandmaster falls off one of the crystals and into a deep ravine. Glitch and the Grimbots are in trouble, can the Go Jetters rescue them with the help of their brand new GO Suits before things get too hot to handle!?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it. Duggee explains that it is a toy but it works exactly like a real train. Hennie arrives and she has a train too. The squirrels ask if they can play with it. You can't play with it; you can play IN it says Hennie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are ... interesting!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 36
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Sierra Nevada in California, searching for a mother grizzly bear and her cubs.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the forests of the Ivory coast in West Africa on a global adventure to find out how chimpanzees break open African walnuts.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 61
programme.desc: The Teletubbies accidentally leave the Tiddlytubbies' gate open and some of them escape into Home Dome. The Teletubbies must find them all and then close the gate.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: There is a yellow sun, a shining sun, a setting sun, a warm sun and a sporty sun. We see Dee snowboard in the snow sun and watch her and a friend help things grow in the sun.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Stan Tall starts to develop rust, it's up to Messy to help him get to Maker Mechanic. Will they make it in time?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 32
programme.desc: Preston needs rescuing from a stuck cable car. But when the car suddenly starts moving again, Mojo has to ride the cable to chase it down and save poor Preston.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch makes the Statue of Liberty fall right into the path of a passing ferry. It's up to the Go Jetters to save the day!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: As Mum goes for a walk along the beach, Bluey runs to catch up with her. Along the way, she has a series of encounters that both excite and test her in her first solo adventure.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 29
programme.desc: When Muffin is told that she is special by her Dad, she interprets it as an excuse to do anything she wants, which means playing Bluey and Bingo's game of Library her way.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond inadvertently eats all the mangosteen fruit that was meant for the new treeshrews, it's up to Andy to find some more. Jetting off in his safari-mobile, Andy heads to the rainforests of Borneo in search of a treeshrew and its favourite food, mangosteens. Along the way, Andy comes face to face with a tree snake and some hungry wild pigs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true? The first problem to fix is Mole's eyesight. Happy thinks he needs glasses, but Mole explains he can't wear them for stunts as they keep falling off his nose. Luckily Duggee has his Glasses Badge, so he has an idea how they can fix them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!! Over the years Duggee has made lots of clothes. The Squirrels are very impressed and help to make some new clothes and present them at their fashion show. But will their Winter, Fall, Spring, Summer Duggee Collection! be a success?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Glitch's plans to open a hotel on an unspoilt beach in Thailand go horribly wrong when a group of macaque monkeys steal his Grim-o-freeze gun.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Rebecca works with the Troublesome Trucks, everyone expects the worst, but she defies everyone's expectations and has a very amusing day.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Scarf Lady takes Sarah and Duck on trip up the mountains. At the top of a mountain they find Poetry Pete reading a poem. When the day is nearly over, Scarf Lady suggests a fast way down the mountain.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck help the baker bake Shoku-pan, a light and fluffy type of Japanese bread.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about bedtime.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are getting ready for a Halloween party, but when JoJo accidentally squashes their spooky pumpkin lantern, they need a replacement! Luckily Gran Gran has a Gran Gran Plan!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: While clearing up the Academy farm after a heavy storm, the Go Jetters wish they could keep the plants above water. Glitch remembers a place where the farmers do just that - Bangladesh, where many farmers grow their crops on wooden platforms to avoid floods in the monsoon season.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 16

programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles-wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: Ancient Powers S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, our ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people and conquer new lands. Who will rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.desc: Joanna Lumley sets off on one her most epic voyages yet. A journey through the world's greatest spice continents. In this episode Joanna is heading to a collection of remote Indonesian islands.

programme.title: Trailblazers: A Rocky Mountain Road Trip S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: The trio are inspired to step out of their own comfort zone as they prepare to emulate Isabella's most impressive feat - summitting a 14,000ft mountain. They also meet the African-American sisters blazing a trail through the male-dominated world of rodeo, howl with wolves at a wildlife sanctuary, and visit the spiritual and religious centres clustered around the Sangre de Cristo Mountains.

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq S01 - EP 1

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Asia's jungles are exceptionally diverse, but whilst they provide shelter, food and opportunity, they are also full of dangers and hidden threats. In monsoon forests, tigers tenaciously hunt their prey, and prehistoric-looking rhinos play courtship games akin to kiss-chase. In tropical rainforests, female orangutans must search far and wide to find their perfect mates. And in the little-known forests of Iraqi Kurdistan, a new Persian leopard population is growing amid minefields.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place. They end their time in the Big Apple by serving up food for the suits on Wall Street from a pizza van.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to Copenhagen to work at Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens. Giles learns to be the brake man on one of the world's oldest wooden rollercoasters, while Monica changes lightbulbs on the ornate Moroccan inspired facade and dives to clean an vast tropical aquarium. Giles learns how to get a table at one of the city's most avant-garde restaurants, and Monica dresses in horror makeup to give Giles the pleasure of being terrified.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Inspired by Gerald Durrell's love of wildlife, Amanda and Alan design their first ever children's bedroom and visit Gerald's widow Lee for inspiration.

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan show some love to the heart of the home, the kitchen. But with ivy growing out of the windows and a roof on the verge of collapse, it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Food Stories S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: In the West Country, Rick meets an organic food pioneer, Britain's most famous female cheese maker, and chef Mark Hix, the master of simple British food. Then, he cooks his own vegetarian dishes.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain shows us how to create the perfect dishes to compliment any kind of day.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The overgrown patch of land on the side of the mountain has been untouched for more than a decade, and with no idea of what plants thrive in the Tuscan terrain, the best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price, who has spent over 30 years cultivating a 15-acre oasis.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city Florence, he's determined to have a mural, but Amanda fears his creative juices could turn into a flood. To nail his aesthetic, Alan travels to the outskirts of the Tuscan capital to meet Jane at her medieval home decorated in rare 14th-century frescos.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place. They end their time in the Big Apple by serving up food for the suits on Wall Street from a pizza van.

programme.title: The Great South African Bake Off S04 - EP 10
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their last challenge of the season they have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress.

programme.title: Hemsley + Hemsley - Healthy and Delicious S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Healthy home cooks Jasmine and Melissa Hemsley create nutrient rich dishes that will warm you up on a cold day. From a buckwheat porridge with coconut to their signature health giving bone broth, the girls offer nutritionally high alternatives to the carbs we're often drawn to when it's chilly outside. A stunning slow cook chicken curry is topped with cauliflower rice for a warming supper and for pudding, a intriguing spicy ground almond apple crumble.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Surrounded as far as they eye can see by vast sand dunes and scorching heat, guests relax in palatial comfort with swimming pools, huge baths and lush gardens. programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 3
